description_long: This object consists of a rectangular wooden tray holding two distinct types of sushi. On one side, there are two triangular onigiri rice balls, each wrapped partially with a strip of dark green nori seaweed. On the other side, there are three pieces of salmon nigiri, each featuring a slice of orange-pink salmon laid over a compact mound of white rice. The rice appears slightly textured, and the salmon has a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The tray itself is light brown with a subtle wood grain pattern and a flat, smooth surface. No additional garnishes, sauces, or utensils are present on the tray.
description: A wooden tray with two onigiri rice balls wrapped in nori and three pieces of salmon nigiri sushi, all neatly arranged and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing two onigiri on the left and three salmon nigiri on the right, all placed on a wooden tray.
description_view_1: Side view with the onigiri in the foreground and the salmon nigiri stacked behind, emphasizing the height of the onigiri.
description_view_2: Reverse front view with three salmon nigiri on the left and two onigiri on the right, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing mostly the backs of the onigiri, with the salmon nigiri barely visible behind them.
